items.summary_en: OpenAI newsroom changed. Most visible article: "Codex Settings".
items.evidence_excerpt: title=Codex settings published=Thu, 23 Apr 2026 10:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/academy/codex-settings description=Learn how to configure Codex settings, including personalization, detail level, and permissions, to run tasks smoothly and customize your workflow. title=Speeding up agentic workflows with WebSockets in the Responses API published=Wed, 22 Apr 2026 10:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/speeding-up-agentic-workflows-with-websockets description=A deep dive into the Codex agent loop, showing how WebSockets and connection-scoped caching reduced API overhead and improved model latency.
diff_excerpt: description=Introducing GPT-5.5, our smartest model yet—faster, more capable, and built for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis across tools.

description=OpenAI makes ChatGPT for Clinicians free for verified U.S. physicians, nurse practitioners, and pharmacists, supporting clinical care, documentation, and research.
-title=Speeding up agentic workflows with WebSockets in the Responses API
